commands:
set -euo pipefail
SECRET=$(aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id arn:aws:secretsmanager:eu-north-1:239541130189:secret:KosDataRdsInstanceSecret430-WhjHZXmxHINa-65c4Sy --region eu-north-1 --query SecretString --output text)
export PGUSER=$(echo "$SECRET" | jq -r .username)
export PGPASSWORD=$(echo "$SECRET" | jq -r .password)
export PGHOST=kosdata-rdsinstance5075e838-9prpmgxajujc.cts46s6u6r3l.eu-north-1.rds.amazonaws.com
export PGPORT=5432
export PGDATABASE=$(echo "$SECRET" | jq -r .dbname)
if [ -z "$PGDATABASE" ] || [ "$PGDATABASE" = "null" ]; then export PGDATABASE=postgres; fi

echo "=== Connecting as $PGUSER @ $PGHOST:$PGPORT/$PGDATABASE ==="

echo "=== 0001_initial.sql ==="
echo "" | base64 -d | psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 2>&1

echo "=== 0002_hnsw_index.sql ==="
echo "" | base64 -d | psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 2>&1

echo "=== Assertion: pgvector extension ==="
psql -t -c "SELECT extversion FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='vector';"
echo "=== Assertion: table count ==="
psql -t -c "SELECT count(*) AS tables FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public';"
echo "=== Assertion: HNSW index ==="
psql -t -c "SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE indexdef ILIKE '%hnsw%';"
